registry_change_assertions.from: At matched total negative-update budget, test whether distance-selective tapering improves the allocation of update mass between useful near and harmful far negatives relative to reciprocal-linear and Global alpha.
registry_change_assertions.reason: Synchronize the v63 result deposition or the frozen E4-TAPER closure protocol approved in this update.
registry_change_assertions.to: At the same per-step raw negative-gradient L2 norm before Adam, test whether distance-selective tapering allocates more update mass to useful near negatives and less to harmful far negatives than reciprocal-linear and a non-selective global stepwise scale. Adam parameter-update norms are logged but are not claimed to be matched.
